children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Chief of the Forest Service, shall establish an Office of International Forestry within the Forest Service within six months after .November 28, 1990

children.heading: Deputy Chief designation
children.label: b Deputy Chief designation
children.text: The Chief shall appoint a Deputy Chief for International Forestry.
be responsible for the international forestry activities of the Forest Service;
coordinate the activities of the Forest Service in implementing the provisions of this chapter; and
serve as Forest Service liaison to the director for the program established pursuant to .section 6701 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each of fiscal years 1996 through 2018 such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
